---
title: "thesen draft"
subtitle: "on hebrew NIFAL passive constructions"

format: html
date: "2026-04-28"
# toc: true
# toc-depth: 3
# toc-expand: true

---

::: {.content-visible when-format="html"}

-----

> [LFG](lfg-index.qmd) / thesenpapier

-----

:::

# overview

{{< include ../test/lfg/thesis/README.md >}}
